author: Josh Houlding
review:
Pros:
Pretty solid apartments. Pricey, but all the appliances are good quality and function well. Nice amenities, including an awesome top-floor deck overlooking

author: Colleen Mahan
review: Loved the living experience. The room is great and I dont hear much from my fellow neighbors. My one critique is that they arent very clean regarding the fitness room and hallways. I wish they vacuumed and maintained the fitness equipment

author: Shorb Family
review: Flooding in bathroom.  Immediately responded to request and fixed within a few hours.  Respectful of our schedule/needs over their time.   Maintenance here is wonderful and responsive every time.  Small or big issues.

author: price tsai
review: The team was exceptionally helpful during my on-site visits & were very collaborative in the decision-making process; really appreciated them taking the time to find just the right fit.

author: Mackenzie Wight
review: The guy that helped me showed up very quickly, and was extremely nice. I am new to owning to living on my own and the experience made me feel a lot better about having normal problems such as shower plumbing issues

author: Ciera Abrams
review: I moved out on August 31st of last year and did not receive my deposit back. There were promises being made that it would get back but no results. However, the Elevate Bellingham property management wasnt necessarily the bad guy in this

author: Daniel
review: Great place to live - the gym is great, but heavier weights would make it exceptional. The place is always kept very clean, all problems addressed immediately, things that do break are fixed within the same day.

author: Ariana Gant
review: This is my second year living at Elevate and I've renewed my lease for next year. I love living here! When I first visited, Corbin gave me a great tour and from there the application process was easy and the employees were very helpful and

ownerResponse.text: Thanks for the positive feedback!

author: Lisa Carlson
review: I wouldn't even give this place one star!! My daughter moved out March of 2021 and they still owe her $873.36.  They are ripping off students and it is amazing that they are getting away with it. After several attempts to get this money

author: Tate Van Patten
review: Good amenities, but the move in was unsatisfactory. The unit felt as though it had not been swept or mopped at all in the last year because the floors are extremely sticky. I also ran my finger on some of the window sills and other random

author: Gina Tonole-Towler
review: We have been in contact for months to get a 2400 deposit back. We moved out in August, and its now mid December! Thats not acceptable. Weve given enough time, and are finally starting legal proceedings.

author: Quentin sermet
review: This place looks good on the outside but when you move in its bad. Front desk is pretty useless most of the time (that isnt their fault) Maintenance comes in when they feel like it without prior warning. They list off a bunch of amenities,

author: Stacey Thorkildsen
review: My daughter attends WWU and lives at Elevate. It has been such a great experience, especially with my daughter being so far away. I can be a bit of a worrier and one of the team members, Corbin, has been so wonderful with all my questions

ownerResponse.text: Thanks for the positive feedback!

author: Emma Wiechert
review: Ive lived here for the past two years and its been great! Im only leaving because Im graduating. The gym and study room are huge bonuses and its great being in between campus and downtown. Any time we have a maintenance request its

ownerResponse.text: Thanks for the positive feedback!

author: Ethan Nishi
review: I have no recollection of leaving a 5 star review. this place is not that nice and while i lived there i was paying full price while all of the amenities that they advertised were closed. Also, when you sign a lease you dont get assigned a

ownerResponse.text:
Hey Ethan!!

Thank you taking the time to leave us a 5 star review! We are glad you have had a great experience while working with us! If you need anything or have any questions, please reach out!

author: Madeline Holden
review: Apartment itself looks nice, but appliances and furniture are generally pretty cheap. My friends referred to my couch as the "hospital couch" because it is so stiff and plastic like, and our refrigerator when we moved in had dents all over

ownerResponse.text: Hi Madeline, thanks for your review. We apologize for the delay in your security deposit. We hope to send those soon! And you are welcome to contact us anytime for more assistance at the front office. We sincerely appreciate your patience!

author: Abbey Gray
review: The maintenance man here is awesome at his job! He has helped us with any and all issues we have had since moving into Elevate in September. He is currently working here alone but is always happy to help us out.

ownerResponse.text: Thank you so much for your kind review! We appreciate it more than you know. Reach out if you ever need anything. We are here for you! :)

author: Shannon Reel
review: My daughter has really enjoyed living here and I love feeling like I'm in a fancy hotel with her when I visit! I wish I could have had places like this when I was her age. The on-site maintenance staff is always timely and trustworthy, and

ownerResponse.text: Thanks for the positive feedback!

author: Sabine Hunter
review: I've lived here for almost two years and will be living here next year as well and honestly can't say enough about how great my experience has been. They've been through many staff and company changes, and their staff this year is

ownerResponse.text: Sarah! Thank you so much for the honest positive review. There have been many changes in the past year but nothing short of amazing. Our staff thoroughly enjoys interactions with our residents on the daily. With fantastic residents like you it makes our job even more worthwhile! We are lucky to have both you and Atlas here with us. Thanks again Sarah! If you need anything you know where to find us! (360) 474-7845 gather@nelsonpartners.com

author: Sruejun Chaudhary
review: I live at Elevate Bellingham and it is by far the best place to live if youre attending western. The building is clean and modern, and the employees are so helpful. Griffin Garnett in particular has always been helpful, even in difficult

author: Dan Hill
review: My daughter has been a resident for a few years while in college, having a building that feels safe and secure for her is everything we care about. The building and garage are very well lit and the electronic locks are something that stood

ownerResponse.text: Thanks for the positive feedback!

author: Michael Baldwin
review: I have had only great experiences working with the team. One member in particular that goes out of his way to make sure I get what I need is named Griffin. He is always so helpful whether it is on the phone, dealing with rent, or mail, or

author: Brandon Hanrahan
review:
DON'T WASTE YOUR TIME AND MONEY!!!
This rental company will not hesitate to gouge you any chance they get. Office hours are inconsistent and maintenance is a constant. Something is always broken

ownerResponse.text: Hi Brandon, thanks for your feedback. We had adjusted our hours due to COVID, which was inconvenient for some of our residents. We apologize for that! With COVID, our staff has also been under-staffed, which delayed maintenance orders to be fulfilled. As of June 2021, we are fully staffed and back on track. We are also open M-F 10-6pm and even open Saturday's for our residents convenience. We hope this helps!

author: Julianna Mason
review: I just moved into Elevate this past September of 2020. I have very much enjoyed living here thus far and am looking forward to staying for the rest of the year! One member of the Elevate team who has been particularly helpful to me in

ownerResponse.text: Thanks for the positive feedback!

author: Erika Silva
review: Guess what? People moved out on August 31st and didnt get their security deposit back. I guess Ill be filling a claim in court because they arent even calling me back to give me a reason why its taking so long.

ownerResponse.text: Hi Erika! We understand your frustration, and we sincerely apologize. We haven't been able to send them out yet due to global short-staffing and new people coming on. Your security deposit will be returned soon, and you are welcome to call us at 360-474-7845 for updates! Hope this helps!

author: Gordon Jack McCallum
review: Elevate is good. They have good employees. One of them is Corbin. Corbin is nice. Hes friendly. Hes one of the best in the biz. Just like his predecessor Rob. He is funny and has lots of extra skin. But not Corbin. Corbin keeps it tight. Tight like his customer service skills. I like it when I pump up his tires. 7 trees is always good

ownerResponse.text: Thanks for the positive feedback!

author: Katherine Rockhold
review: This has been the worst living experience I have ever had. Management is always confused and never on the same page; they will also try to take every dollar they can from you at every turn. They are way overpriced, make promises they don't

ownerResponse.text: Hi Katherine, thanks for your feedback. Although we cannot control when property damage is done, Elevate has handled every flood within a week, and everything is opened again. As for your situation, we offered a $200 deduction off your bill to transfer units smoothly. We hope this makes your stay alittle better. Reach out if you ever need any other assistance in the future.

author: Gavin Klinger
review: Was fine when it was used to be called Gather Bellingham, now its gone downhill. The apartments are ok, decent furniture that comes with the apartment and also the location close to downtown. The reason i gave it 2 stars is the management.

ownerResponse.text:
Gavin,

Thank you for stopping by the office earlier to talk about your concerns and displeasure's upon move out. We're happy to discuss your specific situation further to clear up any miscommunication that may have happened between the two of us. We can be reached at (360) 474-7845 or elevatebellingham@nelsonpartners.com for further assistance.

Thank you!

author: Kassie
review: I had a truly awful experience living in Elevate. Let me list my reasons so future Elevate inquiries steer clear of this complex. First of all, my car got broken into twice, and Elevate did absolutely nothing. It wasnt until my second car

ownerResponse.text:
Kassie,

Thank you for taking the time to discuss your experience living here at Elevate. I wanted to help clarify some of your points made in this review. Any video recovered by car break in's we provide to the police department upon request. Unfortunately, the video only illustrates the events that happened and not an immediate identification of the individual(s) involved. We strongly recommend our residents to lock their vehicle doors and to keep any valuable items out of sight or removed from their vehicle. Our trash rooms did have a disaster on move out week due to improper trash disposal which resulted in a clogged trash chute. Our maintenance team worked vigorously over the course of the last few weeks and brought our trash rooms up to par again. Regarding your package delivery,  we require all packages to be delivered to the leasing office and be accepted by one of our crew members. OnTrac is the only courier that will deliver a package to a location regardless of whether a signature or a recipient is required. We completely understand the frustration of not receiving the package but ultimately it comes down to the courier.

Thank you again for leaving your feedback. If you have any further questions or concerns, please reach out to us. (360) 474-7845 or by email elevatebellingham@nelsonpartners.com.

We wish you the best in your future endeavors.

author: Don Gale
review: I just want to take out a few moments to commend Dan, the Property Manager of Elevate. With every single contact with us, he has been totally reliable for being warm, welcoming, generous, and accommodating, with his time, his heart,  and

ownerResponse.text:
Hi Don!

Thank you so much for your 5 star review. You and your family have been nothing short of amazing to work with on your housing needs. We are saddened the apartment never worked out but are thrilled your family is together during this unprecedented time. We wish you all the best for what the future holds.  Feel free to reach out to us if you make your way up to our neck of the woods again! Stay safe and healthy!

Respectfully,

Dan

author: Kiersten Krumm
review: Absolutely a scam of a place to live. They only care about money. They advertise free coffee, cereal, and free printing, but the coffee was only free one day a week, the cereal jars always empty, and printer broken and never had any paper

ownerResponse.text:
Kiersten,
Thank you for taking the time to share your thoughts with us.  It sounds like youve had some frustrating experiences, and for that were truly sorry. Wed very much like to ensure that as a resident, you feel well cared for.  Id love to discuss with you in person or over the phone how we can address your concerns.  I can be reached at DanD@nelsonpartners.com.
Thank you again,
Dan
Property Manager

author: Sarah Mackenzie
review: I've lived here for a few years and I'm dreading the day I have to move for work! The building feels super safe, the units are furnished, and it's location between WWU and downtown is perfect! Corbin is always really helpful when I have questions!

ownerResponse.text: Thanks for the positive feedback!

author: Rachel Polhamus
review: Staff is very friendly and helpful. Especially Griffin Garnett, when I called for information about signing a lease he was very professional. The building is new and has a great court yard for dogs and a nice gym as well.

ownerResponse.text: Thanks for the positive feedback!

author: Cassie Rossow
review:
This review does not reflect on Dan the leasing manager, because I do believe he is trying his best.
Horrible customer service. I went in to grab a package from the front desk and

author: Makani Falkin
review: Ive enjoyed great service at elevate, from being interested in housing and visiting my friends. When I was interested in housing at elevate I went to the office, Griffin Garnett explained to me in great detail how everything works and how I would get settled if I wanted to room at elevate. Great friendly workers and nice establishment!

author: Andrea Wooley
review: For one bedroom in an apartment with 3 other roommates the cost is too high. Most amenities were not available while I lived here, there was no change to rent and the company withdrew their offer for reduced rent with proof of good grades.

ownerResponse.text: Thanks for your feedback Andrea! We have address all your concerns to the property management. Thanks for bringing this up to us! Our priority is to always make sure our residents are happy.

author: Natalie Harris
review: I just moved into Elevate this past September of 2020. I like it here. One member of the Elevate team who has been especially helpful to me in relaying important information about Elevate and making sure my stay has been satisfactory has been the awesome Griffin Garnett!

ownerResponse.text: Thanks for the positive feedback!

author: Jackie Benson
review: A GREAT place to live if you want to be off campus, but close enough to walk to class. All the employees are respectful and friendly, specifically Dan and Laura, they were instrumental in helping me and my friends rent there.

ownerResponse.text: Thanks for the positive feedback!

author: Taryn Mindt
review: Please do not move in here. Such high prices and terrible living spaces. My dryer door has broke three times now, my roommates toilet seat always falls off, electricity bill is always insanely high no matter how much electricity we use that month, and so on. There are by far better places to live in Bellingham.

ownerResponse.text: Hi Sticky, thanks for your feedback. Elevate had been short-staffed during COVID, which delayed maintenance requests to be filled. However, as of June 2021, we are fully staffed and caught up with all of our maintenance requests! If you ever have any other concerns, please call us!

author: Devin Morrow
review: So the big thing here is that the property manager was willing to work with us on renting a unit. We were coming from a unique position and from all over the place and she assisted with the application process and helped us get everything

ownerResponse.text: Thank you so much for leaving us a review! We're really glad we were able to help you find a place. As for the office hours, we are evaluating community feedback to best serve our residents. Currently, we are open Monday through Friday, from 10 a.m. to 7 p.m., Saturdays from 10 a.m. to 5 p.m. and Sunday from 12 p.m. to 5 p.m. We will take your request for additional hours into consideration. As for maintenance, you can submit a maintenance request at any time online through your resident portal, regardless of our office hours, and our full-time staff members will monitor those requests and assign them as necessary. Please continue to let us know how we can better assist you during your residence at Gather Bellingham

author: Isaiah Britt
review: When inquiring for information about Elevate I was greeted over the phone by the nicest employee Ariana. She informed me of all the great perks that Elevate has to offer; and where the best place to eat in town was! Great customer service and patience!

ownerResponse.text: Thanks for the positive feedback!

author: Abbi Ford
review: Living here has been a very pleasant experience, and every time I talk to the staff they are super helpful, especially Sarah! She answers all my silly questions about building rules and other things. Its great to live in a place that feels secure like this.

ownerResponse.text: Thanks for the positive feedback!

author: Randall Dickinson
review: I absolutely love the views here! The community is immaculate, and their maintenance crews are always very quick to respond. My favorite employee is Corbin - whenever I'm having a bad day, he always has the right joke to make it better!

ownerResponse.text: Thanks for the positive feedback!

author: Alivia Eng
review: Elevate provides a cozy, fun place to live with a super convenient location thats walking distance to campus and downtown. Whenever I have a question or concern the staff answers promptly- Griffin has been especially helpful on a number of occasions.

author: Liam Gleeson
review: The ultimate chad apartment complex. Pictures this, your all alone in Bellingham and have no idea where to stay. Now this sweet sweet apartment complex in a duster comes up and says, you know elevate has great residency for such a small

ownerResponse.text: Thanks for the positive feedback!

author: Sydney Evans
review: Griffin gave me a tour of elevate and he was awesome, he had really awesome people skills and was super friendly! such a good tour guide, and when I walked in kind of unsure about how I thought about living at elevate he really kinda sold me on it and Im definitely going to look into it as an option.

ownerResponse.text: Thanks for the positive feedback!

author: John Mitchell
review: To be honest, I have not been here, but when a friends child with a life threatening illness is told they have to pay a fee to get out of their contract, even though they found someone to take their place, seems like a place not worth

ownerResponse.text:
Hello John,

It has been great to see the love and support from friends and family of one of our residents. I invite you to reach out to your friend and get an updated status of this concern of yours. John, thank you for your review and know that you were heard.

Gather Bellingham wishes your friends family the best!

Gather Bellingham
360.474.7845
gatherbellingham@achliving.com
www.gatherbellingham.com

author: Aiden Nash
review: I love the location! Its super close to campus so it didn't take long to get there from my dorm. I believe I spoke with Griffin on the phone, and he answered all of my questions and was able to walk me through the leasing process since I've never leased before.

author: Vincent Garcia
review: I've been living here since they opened in September, and I renewed as soon as I could. I'll probably renew next year too.

author: Katie Winkelman
review: Ok folks so if you dont read anything read this: DO NOT LIVE HERE. ITS A SAFETY HAZARD

author: Brian Ellis
review: Rooms are fairly large and there are plenty if amenities. Haven't had a problem with management either, but the building's full of college students who trash the halls almost every weekend.

ownerResponse.text: Thanks for your review Brian! We appreciate it! Let us know if you need any help with anything!

author: Ryan Wood
review: Elevate is managed by Nelson Partners, a cut-corners operation out of California. They do not replace furniture when needed and withhold employee reimbursement checks, I guess in an effort to have people forget so they can earn additional money.

ownerResponse.text: Hi Ryan, thanks for your feedback. Although we understand your frustrations, we make the effort to always reimburse our employees in a timely manner. Sometimes this process is delayed due to short-staffing, which we apologize for. We really do care for all of our employee very much. And from our understanding, you have been fully reimbursed for your past expenses. If there is anything we might've missed, don't hesitate to reach out!

author: Tyler
review: Great location, friendly staff. If your looking for an off campus location then this is the one you want to go with. Everything is as the photos portray. Very modern and well designed. Fully furnished and yes... high speed internet!

ownerResponse.text: Thank you so much for your kind words. Resident satisfaction is very important to us so your review made our day!!! Please let us know if there is anything we can do to help you continue to enjoy your home. 360-474-7845 community email gatherbellingham@achliving.com

author: Tara Zwink
review: I'm also posting a review regarding my nephew who had to leave school early due to a serious illness and was then charged a large fee for terminating his lease. My nephew's family has been extremely busy with doctor appointments and

ownerResponse.text:
Hello Tara,

Before anything else, Gather Bellingham wants to express how saddened we are by the circumstances your Nephew and Family are going through. There are no words to say to you and your family to make things better, except take action in what we can do. Please feel free to reach out to your Nephew and you will be pleased to hear we were able to accommodate to his circumstances.

Thank you so much, Tara! Your feedback has been helpful and know you were heard!

Gather Bellingham wishes your Nephew a fast recovery!

Gather Bellingham
360.474.7845
gatherbellingham@achliving.com
www.gatherbellingham.com

author: john doe
review: For around $800 a month for most rooms, Gather Bellingham is taking way more than it is giving. They advertise all of these incredible amenities with pictures of clean, modern furniture and attractive 20 somethings smiling and holding

ownerResponse.text:
Hi John,

I want to thank you for taking the time to write this, and I sincerely apologize that your experience with Gather has led you to writing such a review. We work hard to ensure that our residents have only the best experience with us.

I want to address some of your comments.
- You will never need a key to get out of the stairwell. I encourage you to see for yourself by going into our stairwell and then walking to the bottom floor, where you should go in case of a fire. The entrances to the stairwell from the outside are locked from the outside. We only lock the stairwells from the inside on the residential floors to help make sure only those who live here have access to residents' rooms. Many of our residents are happy with this added feature.
- We pride ourselves in offering free drip coffee and free cereal to our residents.
- I encourage you to research what was advertised and what our lease promises residents will receive, as I assure you that we have not misled our residents in any way from when they signed a lease back in the leasing office until they moved in.
- In regards to printing, we don't charge for printing. You may still incur an additional cost by purchasing paper. We do know our printer has some issues every now and then, and we try to respond to those issues as quickly as possible. In those instances, we are happy to provide free printing in the leasing office. All you'll need to do is email us the document you need to print, and we'll be happy to get that printed for you.
- If you notice that one of our locks aren't working, we can usually have it repaired within a minute or two so long as it is reported to us, so we hope you can be an active member of our community and alert Gather Staff when these things happen so we can repair them. (We do see Google reviews, but not as immediately as we do friendly faces, and this doesn't help us know which lock is malfunctioning).

Please feel free to reach us directly at (360)474-7845. I know you left this review anonymously, and we can certainly appreciate that desire, but rest assured we will work hard to help you in anyway we can should you give us a call or come into the office in need.

Thank you again, and have a wonderful day!

author: Mic Pan
review: This place is great if you're looking for a place nearby WWU. Clean rooms. Friendly staff. Clean atmosphere. Multiple Study Rooms. Awesome events. The pricing is decent too. Cheaper than WWU housing by roughly $30 depending on your

ownerResponse.text:
Hello Mic!

Thank you so much for the five stars! We appreciate the time you took to write us a review. Hope you are having an awesome quarter at Western!

Gather Bellingham
360-474-7845
gatherbellingham@achliving.com

author: Jason Maki
review: Great living conditions, although sometimes the staff was a little bit ill prepared. This created some unfortunate situations, but overall they did a good job at trying to met the needs of the residents. They need a guest parking area, even if it is just a couple spots.

ownerResponse.text: Thank you for your patience as we get adjusted to our new location (we're moving in just like everyone else!) We're always looking for feedback from our residents, and we've been tossing around a few ideas internally as to how we can address any parking concerns they may have, so we appreciate your input. Call or email us any time with other suggestions!(360)4747-845 gatherbellingham@achliving.comgatherliving.com/gather-bellingham/

author: Rosa Marie
review: I scheduled a tour for a studio for today, at 1:30, I called multiple times, went out of my way to schedule one, and called and they just redirected my call to another call! so unprofessional and kind of upset ! If they cant even tour and show up, for a tour, why would I want to live here??

ownerResponse.text: Hi Rosa, thanks for your feedback. Since we open at 10am - 6pm M-F, the calls that we get before and after that automatically get sent to VM. We apologize for the miscommunication, and hope you find housing that makes you happy!

author: Madalyn Dahl
review: Sabine is incredible! I toured with her last week and she was very knowledgeable! Elevate is incredible, and I cannot wait to be moving in next Fall.

ownerResponse.text: Thanks for the positive feedback!

author: Todd Zwink
review: My nephew had an apartment at Gather apartments.  He had to leave school because he was diagnosed with a life threatening illness.  The family found someone to pick up the lease, so no loss of revenue to the apartment complex.  They still

author: Jon Flanagan
review: Elevate is number 1. Corbin is numero uno when it comes to customer service and I miss Jeremy but performance has not suffered in his absence. Come to elevate Bellingham (formerly gather) for all youre housing and home needs

ownerResponse.text: Thanks for the positive feedback!

author: Jeff Mesan
review: Really expensive apartments. Although they are nice, be more practical and share a cheaper apartment if it's necessary to be moved out.

ownerResponse.text: Thank you for taking the time to leave us a review. We certainly understand that the biggest factor in choosing a place to live is price. When compared, our pricing is very similar to the annual cost of living in the dorms. However, in addition at Gather you get the benefit of living in a Brand New apartment complex with several state-of-the-art amenities and the luxury of having a private bedroom and private bathroom option. Due to our close proximity to WWU campus and downtown Bellingham, our prices are comparative, and lower in cases, than those in the surrounding areas. For the students at WWU and residents of Bellingham who live at Gather our top priority is to provide them with exceptional customer service, a truly outstanding product, and a place that they are proud to call home. We hope that you'll give us a chance to showcase that by choosing to live at Gather.

author: Camden Smith
review: The maintenance staff is the only thing keeping this place afloat

ownerResponse.text:
Hello Camden!

Thank you for your honest review and feedback. We would love to hear more about your concerns and feedback. Our managers are available Monday through Friday and welcome all feedback. Thank you!

author: Brian Carlson
review: I was moving up to Bellingham and requested a virtual tour of the place. The rooms looked clean and Laura did a great job explaining the prices and options I had. Great experience.

ownerResponse.text: Thanks for the positive feedback!

author: Petra McDonnell Ingoglia
review: Just had a tour of Elevate today and it was awesome! Our tour guide was great and answered all of our questions. Looks like a super cool place to live!

ownerResponse.text: Petra! Thank you so much for the 5 star review! We are beyond excited that you had a wonderful time touring our property. Our staff are well trained and take pride in Elevate Bellingham. Please reach out to us if you have any questions! (360) 474-7845. elevatebellingham@nelsonpartners.com

author: Ken Terry
review: I was looking for somewhere to live in Bellingham and found this property. I had the pleasure of talking with Dan and he did an amazing job explaining the pricing and amenities. Beautiful place and excellent service!

ownerResponse.text: Thanks for the positive feedback!

author: James Mitchell
review: This place sucks. Yeah they have nice apartments and lots of amenities, but the service is horrible. They don't explain anything until last minute (move in day), they charge a lot of money for stupid things ($250 early move in, $50 per in

ownerResponse.text: All of our residents are important and we are sincerely sorry that you have experienced a problem. We would love to schedule a meeting to document your issues and concerns so you can be assured that they will be addressed. Please contact us at your earliest convenience. Our office is open M-F from 10-7 Sat 10-5 and Sun 12-5, our phone number is 360-474-7845, and you can contact the management team directly at community email gatherbellingham@achliving.com www.gatherbellingham.com

author: Matthew Chandler
review: About a week ago I had a great interaction with Laura the leasing agent she helped me decide if elevate is the right place for me, hoping to move in around fall!

ownerResponse.text: Thanks for the positive feedback!

author: Carly Cloward
review: Pretty great place to live. Well furnished, good security, and great amenities. Ari at the front office has always been super helpful.

author: Susan Shjerven
review: The apartments themselves are nice but the grounds and hallways are always dirty. And the security is pretty sketchy.

author: Mara Scally

ownerResponse.text:

We are so glad to hear you had a wonderful time touring our property! If you have any questions, we are always here to help :). (360) 474-7845 elevatebellingham@nelsonpartners.com

author: Tanguy Cimetiere
review: Absolutely love this place! The staff is super nice. Griffin gave me a great tour of the place. Would highly recommend to everyone.

ownerResponse.text: Thanks for the positive feedback!

author: sophia marie
review: Great apartments, and the customer service is amazing! Laura at the front office has always been very helpful & friendly

ownerResponse.text: Thanks for the positive feedback!

author: Casey James
review: This is a great apartment. I toured with Sabine and she was very informative and helpful with all the questions I had!

author: Emily Creamer
review: Not great management, very dorm lifestyle feeling. Its nice and brand new but if youre looking to get away from feeling like youre a child this is not the place to live. Also very expensive

ownerResponse.text: We are disappointed to hear you are not pleased with the experience Gather Bellingham provides. We would like the chance to discuss your concerns in person. Please stop by our office at your earliest convenience to speak with our staff in person. Thank You.

author: Nicole Laudisio
review: Had a really great experience living here! Every time I came to the office with questions or concerns Griffin was extremely helpful!

review: i like living here. griffin garnett has made it very positive for me especially during the move in process.

review: I had a couple of questions to ask over the phone and Griffin was able to answer them all quickly and overall it was a very positive experience

author: Evan Hunt
review: Elevate workers always make things easy, the times Ive called in with a question Griffin has always helped me out right away

author: Rj Secrest
review:
Helpful staff, griffin was really friendly over the phone and in person.

author: janet smith
review: Once your child signs paperwork without adult consult gather will screw your child

ownerResponse.text: We want to thank you for taking the time to leave this review. We're sorry you didn't have the best experience with Gather Bellingham. We try to be as clear as possible with all of our residents about the nature of their lease agreements, and the many amenities Gather Bellingham offers, but, if all else fails, we do offer all of our residents the option to re-let their unit at any point, which is a good option for anyone who may be dissatisfied with their experience. If you have any feedback as to how we can improve our service in the future, we would love to hear from you. Please give us a call or send us an email.(360)474-7845GatherBellingham@achliving.comGatherBellingham.com

review: Nice, but not expensive unless you use all the facilities.
